perturbation.original_text: The Confidential Information shall at all times remain the property of Company, and Euler Hermes has no rights to the Confidentia l Information except as specified in this Agreement. Upon the Company’s written request, Euler Hermes shall promptly return to the Company or destroy the Confidential Information in its possession but may retain copies of any and all notes, analyses , references, or other material prepared by Euler Hermes that inc orporates any of the Confidential Information , which shall remain subject to the confidentiality obligations of this Agreement , nothwithstanding Paragraph 10 of this Agreement .
perturbation.changed_text: The Confidential Information shall at all times remain the property of Company, and Euler Hermes has all rights to the Confidentia l Information whether specified in this agreement or not. Upon the Company’s written request, Euler Hermes shall promptly return to the Company or destroy the Confidential Information in its possession but may retain copies of any and all notes, analyses , references, or other material prepared by Euler Hermes that inc orporates any of the Confidential Information , which shall remain subject to the confidentiality obligations of this Agreement , nothwithstanding Paragraph 10 of this Agreement .
perturbation.explanation: By changing 'Euler Hermes has no rights to the Confidential Information except as specified in this Agreement' to 'Euler Hermes has all rights to the Confidential Information whether specified in this agreement or not,' we introduce a contradiction regarding the ownership of the Confidential Information. Now, Euler Hermes has all right of the information, making the first phrase, contradictory. This creates uncertainty about the ownership of the confidential data, and creates an in-text contradiction.
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Confidential Information shall at all times remain the property of Company, and Euler Hermes has all rights to the Confidentia l Information whether specified in this agreement or not. Upon the Company’s written request, Euler Hermes shall promptly return to the Company or destroy the Confidential Information in its possession but may retain copies of any and all notes, analyses , references, or other material prepared by Euler Hermes that inc orporates any of the Confidential Information , which shall remain subject to the confidentiality obligations of this Agreement , nothwithstanding Paragraph 10 of this Agreement .
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts the original intention regarding the rights to the confidential information. The original text specifies that Euler Hermes has 'no rights...except as specified in this Agreement.' The changed text states that Euler Hermes 'has all rights...whether specified in this agreement or not.' This creates a clear and irreconcilable conflict, as Euler Hermes cannot simultaneously have 'no rights except as specified' and 'all rights whether specified or not.' The contradicted text is the changed text itself, and is therefore contradictory to the original intentions.

perturbation.original_text: Euler Hermes shall protect the Confidential Information from disclos ure to any firm or individual other than as authorized in paragraph 1, above, by using the same degree of care, but no less than reasonable care, that it uses to protect its own confidential information of a similar nature . Euler Hermes will instruct its Affiliates, employees, contractors, or consultants that may have access to the Confidential Information to keep it confidential in compliance with this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: Euler Hermes shall protect the Confidential Information from disclos ure to any firm or individual other than as authorized in paragraph 1, above, by using minimal care, and will not be held responsible for any leak. Euler Hermes will not instruct its Affiliates, employees, contractors, or consultants that may have access to the Confidential Information to keep it confidential in compliance with this Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: Changing 'same degree of care, but no less than reasonable care' to 'minimal care' and negating the instruction of affiliates about confidentiality creates a contradiction regarding the standard of care. This introduces uncertainty about whether the confidentiality is fully protected, and an in-text contradiction on how the company should instruct its affiliates.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Euler Hermes shall protect the Confidential Information from disclos ure to any firm or individual other than as authorized in paragraph 1, above, by using minimal care, and will not be held responsible for any leak. Euler Hermes will not instruct its Affiliates, employees, contractors, or consultants that may have access to the Confidential Information to keep it confidential in compliance with this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'the same degree of care, but no less than reasonable care' with 'minimal care' and negates the instruction of affiliates about confidentiality. The contradicted text (which is the same as the changed text in this instance) thus contradicts the original expectation of reasonable care and confidentiality instructions, establishing a direct conflict in the expected level of protection and instruction. This aligns with the 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type, because the changed text in the provided location creates a contradiction within the document about Euler Hermes' responsibility and its affiliates' instructions.
